test.name: TC-001 Login réussi avec un utilisateur standard

kw.name: Open App And Login
Evaluate
kw.msg: ${_safe} = TC-001 Login réussi avec un utilisateur standard
kw.arg: ''.join('_' if c in r'<>:"/\|?*()' else c for c in """${TEST NAME}""")
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a2fa8e5+14e45] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a2fa950+14eb0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a06d4d6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0b8166] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0eff32] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0ea191] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0e9433] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a036005] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a610149+32a6a9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a60a715+324c75] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a62c012+346572] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a317cb5+32215] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a32087c+3addc] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a034d9a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a7760a8+490608] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffddcf9e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffdde46c3fc+2c]

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.status: InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.138); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a2fa8e5+14e45] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a2fa950+14eb0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a06d6ed] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a058762] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a07f00c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0f7170] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a114122] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0b90e8] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0b9fc3] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a610149+32a6a9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a60a715+324c75] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a62c012+346572] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a317cb5+32215] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a32087c+3addc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a3040e4+1e644] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a304296+1e7f6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a2e8737+2c97] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffddcf9e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffdde46c3fc+2c]

test.name: TC-002 Login échoué avec identifiants invalides

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.arg: ''.join('_' if c in r'<>:"/\|?*()' else c for c in """${TEST NAME}""")
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.status: Execution terminated by signal

test.name: TC-003 Login bloqué pour l'utilisateur locked_out_user
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-004 Logout depuis le menu latéral
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-005 Affichage de la liste complète des produits (Read)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-006 Tri des produits par prix croissant
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-007 Tri des produits par nom décroissant (Z à A)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-008 Ajout d'un produit au panier depuis la liste (Create)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-009 Ajout d'un produit au panier depuis la fiche produit (Create)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-010 Modification de la quantité d'un produit dans le panier (Update)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-011 Tentative de checkout avec champ prénom vide (Erreur formulaire)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-012 Checkout complet avec informations valides (Happy path)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-013 Accès direct à la page panier sans authentification (Access control)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-014 Ouverture et fermeture du menu latéral depuis la page produit
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-015 Navigation vers la page "All Items" via le menu latéral
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-016 Réinitialisation de l'état de l'application via le menu
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-017 Comportement du compte "performance_glitch_user" (Performance edge case)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-018 Vérification du badge du panier lors de l'ajout de plusieurs produits
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-019 Accès à la page "About" via le menu latéral
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-020 Tentative d'ajout d'un produit déjà présent dans le panier (Idempotence)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

errors.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a2fa8e5+14e45] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a2fa950+14eb0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a06d4d6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0b8166] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0eff32] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0ea191] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a0e9433] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a036005] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a610149+32a6a9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a60a715+324c75] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a62c012+346572] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a317cb5+32215] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a32087c+3addc] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff74a034d9a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff74a7760a8+490608] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffddcf9e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffdde46c3fc+2c]
